name: Armor of Resistance
description: You have Resistance to one type of damage while you wear this armor. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly.

effect.resistance: One damage type (determined by DM or random roll)
effect.mechanics: Take half damage (rounded down) from that damage type

attunement.description: You must attune to this armor by wearing it for 1 hour.

activation.description: The magic functions automatically while attuned and wearing the armor

determination: DM chooses or randomly determines by rolling 1d10
notes: The damage type is determined when the armor is created or found and cannot be changed. This is a valuable protective item against known damage types.
